title: Applied Materials 3Q financial results beat estimates; boosts guidance
text: Applied Materials, Inc announced after Thursday's close that its third-quarter 2023 revenue slipped 1% to $6.43 billion but surpassed the analyst consensus forecast of $6.15 billion.  The semiconductor materials provider also posted earnings per share (EPS) for the period of $1.90, $0.16 better than expectations.
